title: ALP Repo Object
description: Declares an external repository that participates in cross-repository orchestration (v4 Pillar 2). A repo is either a local path or a Git URL fetched into .alp/.cache/repos/<id>/.

src.description: Local filesystem path (relative to the declaring .alp root) or a Git URL (https, ssh, git+https).

commit.description: Pin the fetched repo to an exact Git commit hash (recommended for reproducibility).

branch.description: Git branch to track when commit is not specified (e.g. main).

description.description: Human-readable description of the repo's role in the federation.
